description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style cabinet or shelf unit, primarily constructed from dark metal with a matte finish. The front face features two large, square compartments with orange and white hazard-style markings, each equipped with a circular locking mechanism, suggesting secure storage. To the left, there are four open cubby shelves, ideal for organizing smaller items, while the right side includes a smaller orange compartment and a control panel or button. The central section is a large, open rectangular cutout, providing a pass-through or storage space for larger objects. The back and sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing durability and security, making this unit suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or utility rooms.
description: A heavy-duty, dark metal cabinet with orange hazard-marked compartments, open cubby shelves, and a large central pass-through, designed for secure and organized storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: A solid, featureless black side panel with no visible compartments or openings.
description_view_1: The detailed front view shows two orange hazard-marked compartments, four open cubby shelves on the left, a smaller orange compartment and control panel on the right, and a large central pass-through.
description_view_2: The opposite side panel, identical to view 0, is solid black with no visible features.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a large open rectangular cutout, mirroring the central pass-through seen from the front, with the rest of the surface solid and unadorned.
